mapper.sql: id, site_id, git_provider, git_repo_url, git_branch, git_auto_sync, git_account_id, cf_account_id, deploy_platform, cloudflare_project_name, cloudflare_project_id, custom_domains, deploy_status, deploy_url, last_deploy_time, last_deploy_log, deploy_config, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM gb_site_code_config WHERE site_id = #{siteId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gb_site_code_config ( site_id, git_provider, git_repo_url, git_branch, git_auto_sync, git_account_id, cf_account_id, deploy_platform, cloudflare_project_name, cloudflare_project_id, custom_domains, deploy_status, deploy_url, last_deploy_time, last_deploy_log, deploy_config ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{gitProvider}, #{gitRepoUrl},
#{gitBranch} 'main' , #{gitAutoSync}, #{gitAccountId}, #{cfAccountId}, #{deployPlatform}, #{cloudflareProjectName}, #{cloudflareProjectId}, #{customDomains},
#{deployStatus} 'not_deployed' , #{deployUrl}, #{lastDeployTime}, #{lastDeployLog}, #{deployConfig} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_code_config ( site_id, git_provider, git_repo_url, git_branch, git_auto_sync, git_account_id, cf_account_id, deploy_platform, cloudflare_project_name, cloudflare_project_id, custom_domains, deploy_status, deploy_url, last_deploy_time, last_deploy_log, deploy_config ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{gitProvider}, #{gitRepoUrl},
#{gitBranch} 'main' , #{gitAutoSync}'0', #{gitAccountId}, #{cfAccountId}, #{deployPlatform}, #{cloudflareProjectName}, #{cloudflareProjectId}, #{customDomains},
#{deployStatus} 'not_deployed' , #{deployUrl}, #{lastDeployTime}, #{lastDeployLog}, #{deployConfig} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE git_provider = VALUES(git_provider), git_repo_url = VALUES(git_repo_url), git_branch = VALUES(git_branch), git_auto_sync = VALUES(git_auto_sync), git_account_id = VALUES(git_account_id), cf_account_id = VALUES(cf_account_id), deploy_platform = VALUES(deploy_platform), cloudflare_project_name = VALUES(cloudflare_project_name), cloudflare_project_id = VALUES(cloudflare_project_id), custom_domains = VALUES(custom_domains), deploy_status = VALUES(deploy_status), deploy_url = VALUES(deploy_url), last_deploy_time = VALUES(last_deploy_time), last_deploy_log = VALUES(last_deploy_log), deploy_config = VALUES(deploy_config), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE gb_site_code_config SET deploy_status = #{deployStatus}, deploy_url = #{deployUrl}, last_deploy_time = #{lastDeployTime}, last_deploy_log = #{lastDeployLog}, update_time = NOW() WHERE site_id = #{siteId}
